title: kyoyami
description: Just a simple Close-To-Vanilla Survival Resource Pack.
body:
![A totally black minecraft skin with an indifferate, bored face infront of a pink background and the text "kyoyami' above the head of the minecraft skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a5104c09fcd76651e5f7ece720b11adeae825ef.jpeg)

A Minecraft **survival resource pack** with **few changes to the vanilla textures**.

Mostly the GUI and some of the most important items for a simple survival world were changed to my liking. 
It's up to you if you like it too.
You can see pretty much everything I changed in the tab "Gallery" 

[If you would like a custom totem with your skins face as a design, you can message me]
